mapper.select: SELECT t.tag, COUNT(*) AS totalSubmit, SUM(CASE WHEN qs.status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS acCount, SUM(CASE WHEN qs.status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failCount, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN qs.status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) AS acRate FROM question_submit qs JOIN question q ON qs.questionId = q.id JOIN JSON_TABLE(q.tags, '$[*]' COLUMNS(tag VARCHAR(64) PATH '$')) t WHERE qs.userId = #{userId} AND qs.isDelete = 0 AND qs.status IN (2, 3) GROUP BY t.tag ORDER BY acRate ASC

SELECT qs.questionId, q.title AS questionTitle, q.tags AS questionTags, qs.judgeInfo, qs.language, qs.createTime FROM question_submit qs JOIN question q ON qs.questionId = q.id WHERE qs.userId = #{userId} AND qs.status = 3 AND qs.isDelete = 0 ORDER BY qs.createTime DESC LIMIT 100
